title: Atletico Madrid vs Arsenal LIVE: Champions League semi-final score, commentary & updates - BBC Sport
body: Live Reporting (active) Report Scores Line-ups Match Stats Watch & listen Head-to-head Summary Arsenal draw with Atletico Madrid in Champions League semi-final first leg Alvarez equalises with penalty after Gyokeres scored first-half spot-kick Gunners controversially have second penalty overturned by VAR Listen to BBC Radio 5 Live commentary at top of page Gunners beat Sporting in last eight, Atletico knocked out Barcelona Winner will face PSG or Bayern Munich in final on 30 May Close form Send us your views Get involved Live Reporting Jess Anderson Show Most recent Most popular Chris Sutton Former striker on BBC Radio 5 Live at Metropolitano Stadium It's all to play for. But Arteta would have liked to be going back to the Emirates ahead in this tie. And maybe they should have been. 25 15 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing John Murray BBC football correspondent on BBC Radio 5 Live at the Metropolitano It's been competitive. It's not been the thrills and spills of last night but it held the attention. We've had controversy and plenty of talking points. Arsenal will have the edge with this scoreline here at 1-1. 101 51 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing An absorbing match in a very different way to last night. But it's evenly poised at the halfway point of this Champions League semi-final. 260 72 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Ally McCoist Former Rangers striker on TNT Sports Mikel Arteta has more reason to be disappointed in a couple decisions. But both managers will be reasonably happy if it stays like this. 334 189 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Into the sixth of seven added minutes. Is there a winner in this for either side? 81 94 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Chris Sutton Former striker on BBC Radio 5 Live at Metropolitano Stadium Molina absolutely thunders that, and he's not far away. 179 136 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Nahuel Molina runs onto the ball on the edge of the penalty box and hits his strike with venom but it was always rising and goes over the bar. A really good strike. 125 102 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Ally McCoist Former Rangers striker on TNT Sports Atletico have switched completely back to the first 45 minutes. They seem comfortable to hold what they have. There is a greater appetite to stay in the game than go on and win it and that has been reflected in Simeone's substitutions. 188 116 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Whatever the outcome between these two, I cannot see either winning the final against either PSG or Bayern. Steve, Chile What's clear and obvious is that the winner of this tie will be collecting their runner up trophy in the final. David, Wells-Next-The-Sea 968 802 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing A lovely ball floated to the back post is headed back across goal by Alex Baena but Ademola Lookman can't leap high enough to connect and it's out. 73 36 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Arsenal looking the more likely to score here, can they find a late winner? 625 358 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing We'll have seven minutes of added time. Not surprising given the lengthy VAR checks in this second half. Image source, Getty Images 261 156 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Declan Rice goes for an ambitious effort from range but it's well wide. 363 190 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Ally McCoist Former Rangers striker on TNT Sports We might not have had all the goals from last night but there has been plenty of drama. 347 201 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Elizabeth Conway BBC Sport Spanish football reporter at Metropolitano Stadium The momentum has shifted in Arsenal's favour in the last few minutes. 443 280 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Substitution for the hosts. Nahuel Molina is on for Johnny Cardoso. 88 72 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing It's a really good point, Jay. Not sure the debate here is whether it was a penalty or not but whether it should have been overturned. Was it that clear and obvious? 325 178 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing To get VAR involved it has to be a clear and obvious error. It didn't meet that criteria so the pen should have stood. If it was a mistake why not book for simulation?! Jay, Leeds 1079 543 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Arsenal have improved since the penalty/non-penalty incident. Another substitution for the visitors. Ben White makes way for Cristhian Mosquera. 349 145 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Nedum Onuoha Former Manchester City defender on MOTD: UEFA Champions League Did Hancko touch Eze? When I saw the second TV angle, I didn't think the contact was as clear. You can hear more from Onuoha about this decision on MOTD: Uefa Champions League at 22:40 BST on BBC One and the BBC Sport website and app. 348 776 Share close panel Share page Copy link About sharing Match report to appear here.
